allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/v1/diagnosticos -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-key-local" -d '{""tipo"":""hydration_error"",""mensagem"":""Hydration failed""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/v1/diagnosticos -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer dev-secret-key-local" -d '{""tipo"":""sql_analysis"",""mensagem"":"""",""dados"":{""query"":""SELECT * FROM users"",""tempo_execucao"":900}}')
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth login --git-protocol https --web)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr view 1 --repo mirutee/devinsight-api 2>&1)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr checks 1 --repo mirutee/devinsight-api 2>&1)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr merge 1 --repo mirutee/devinsight-api --merge --delete-branch 2>&1)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr view 1 --repo mirutee/devinsight-api --json state,mergedAt 2>&1)
Bash(ls C:/PROJETOS/API/*.json C:/PROJETOS/API/*.yaml C:/PROJETOS/API/.env* C:/PROJETOS/API/Procfile C:/PROJETOS/API/Dockerfile)
